currentQuest.rewardSummary: 11 Guild Coins and Rare loot: Cloak of the Restless Muse
currentQuest.story: Request completed: Read book. For 1 minutes, the hero made a brave turn-in to the guild board. The reward was 11 Guild Coins and Rare loot: Cloak of the Restless Muse. The hero's gathered fortune resonated, increasing the coin reward to 11 Guild Coins.

questLog: A new figure waits at the edge of the story. Choose who enters your journey next.

pendingNpcChoices.name: Thaleia Threadkeeper 2
pendingNpcChoices.description: A calm guild archivist who teaches the hero how to turn questboard requests into reliable habit.
pendingNpcChoices.storyHook: Thaleia offers to help the hero name the next request hidden on the board.

pendingNpcChoices.name: Makar Quickstep 2
pendingNpcChoices.description: A competitive quest runner who treats every board request as a challenge to outdo the guild.
pendingNpcChoices.storyHook: Makar challenges the hero to prove that steady focus can beat raw speed in the guild ranks.

pendingNpcChoices.name: Ione Lantern-Bearer 2
pendingNpcChoices.description: A warm-hearted guildmate who carries a little lantern said to glow brighter near honest effort.
pendingNpcChoices.storyHook: Ione offers companionship on days when accepting a guild request feels harder than turning it in.

storyChapters.title: Small Request 6: Read book
storyChapters.rewardSummary: 11 Guild Coins and Rare loot: Cloak of the Restless Muse
storyChapters.body: The guild request was simple: Read book. It was only one posting on the board, but it still mattered. Each completed request trains the hero toward the Guild Charter: Build better habits. For 1 minute, the hero turned attention and effort into progress. When the work was done, the board marked it fulfilled, and the guild issued 11 Guild Coins and Rare loot: Cloak of the Restless Muse as a sign of success.  The deed joined the hero's growing legend, another thread in a myth still being written. Thaleia Threadkeeper 1, the Guild Mentor, watches this moment and begins to understand how the hero turns disorder into motion.

storyChapters.title: Small Request 5: Clean my room
storyChapters.rewardSummary: 10 Guild Coins and Common loot: Dried Herb of Calm
storyChapters.body: The guild request was simple: Clean my room. It was only one posting on the board, but it still mattered. Each completed request trains the hero toward the Guild Charter: Build better habits. For 1 minute, the hero turned attention and effort into progress. When the work was done, the board marked it fulfilled, and the guild issued 10 Guild Coins and Common loot: Dried Herb of Calm as a sign of success.  The deed joined the hero's growing legend, another thread in a myth still being written. No companion has joined the road yet, so the victory echoes quietly through the hero's own thoughts.

character.name: Eris-Touched Hero
character.description: A fantasy adventurer touched by Eris, learning to turn chaos into quests.
character.portraitPrompt: Create a square bust portrait of Eris-Touched Hero, an Eris-Touched focus RPG hero. Character details: A fantasy adventurer touched by Eris, learning to turn chaos into quests. Race/species: Goblin. Hair color: Black. Skin color: Olive. The character should feel heroic, personal, magical, and touched by chaos. Theros/Greece god portrait style: square bust portrait, polished anime-inspired fantasy character art with watercolor-and-ink texture, expressive face, crisp dark linework, translucent watercolor washes, gold ornamental details, Greek mythic clothing and jewelry, luminous divine halo or sigil behind the head, swirling magical energy, soft parchment-like rough painted border, ancient Greek ruins or symbolic mythic motifs in the background, subtle glittering specks, dramatic but elegant lighting, no text, no watermark.
